Name: KNOCKBACK_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters relating to knockback.

Fields.Name: None: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the none damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Minimal: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the minimal damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Small: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the small damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Medium: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the medium damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Large: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the large damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Blow-off: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the blow-off damage animation is applied.

Fields.Name: Guard - None: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the none damage animation is applied when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard - Small: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the small damage animation is applied when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard - Medium: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the medium damage animation is applied when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard - Large: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the large damage animation is applied when guarding.

Fields.Name: Trunk Break: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the AC trunk is broken.

Fields.Name: Guard - Trunk Break: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when the AC trunk is broken when guarding.

Fields.Name: Damage Level 1: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when at damage level 1.

Fields.Name: Damage Level 2: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when at damage level 2.

Fields.Name: Melee - Damage Level 1: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when at damage level 1, when using a melee blade.

Fields.Name: Melee - Damage Level 2: Knockback %
Fields.Description: The knockback multiplier to apply when at damage level 2, when using a melee blade.
